name: i18n-sync
description: Detect missing translation keys across multi-language files, sync them, and generate coverage reports.
intent_triggers: 幫我補齊 ja.json 缺少的 key
scan i18n 差異並輸出報告

command.description: Subcommand: scan, missing, sync, coverage, unused, hardcoded, clean, sort

source.description: Source code directory to scan for hardcoded strings or unused keys

placeholder.description: Placeholder value for missing keys: 'base' or custom string like '[TODO] {value}'

lang.description: Target language for hardcoded string detection

examples.intent: 檢查 locales 目錄中各語言檔案缺少哪些翻譯 key
同步缺少的翻譯 key 並以英文值作為佔位符
